## Type of Update

<!-- Pick one. -->

- [ ] New ADR (`knowledge/architecture-decisions/`)
- [ ] Glossary term (`.cognition/memory/permanent/glossary.md`)
- [ ] Invariant (`.cognition/memory/permanent/invariants.md`)
- [ ] Business rule (`.cognition/memory/permanent/business_rules.md`)
- [ ] Domain knowledge (`.cognition/memory/permanent/domain_knowledge.md`)
- [ ] Lesson learned (`.cognition/curator/lessons_learned.md`)
- [ ] Retrospective (`knowledge/retrospectives/`)
- [ ] Risk (`knowledge/risks/`)
- [ ] Technical debt entry (`.cognition/reviewer/technical_debt.md`)
- [ ] Roadmap update (`.cognition/memory/roadmap/`)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Summary

<!-- A one-sentence description of the change. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this update needed? -->

## Proposed Content

<!-- The actual content to add or modify. -->

## Affected Files

<!-- Which files will change? -->

## Reviewers

<!-- Who should review? Architect? Curator? Domain expert? -->

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Content proposed
- [ ] Reviewed by an architect (if architectural)
- [ ] Cross-references updated
- [ ] Linked to relevant ADR / feature / bug
- [ ] Index files updated (if any)
